holdings.infoBox: EGGQ is an equity ETF with a total of 35 individual holdings. The top holdings are First American Government Obligations Fund Class X stock at 14.56%, Seagate Technology Holdings at 10.28%, Lumentum Holdings at 8.13%, Bloom Energy at 7.76%, and Micron Technology at 6.88%.

overview.description: The NestYield Visionary ETF (EGGQ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund actively manages a concentrated US large-cap equity portfolio, alongside options-based income strategies. Equity exposure may be held directly or collateralized synthetic positions EGGQ was launched on Dec 26, 2024 and is issued by NestYield.
